text.title: Alert Noise Budget Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example demonstrating the procedure and output contract.

example.title: Weekly noise-budget report for payment-service
example.code: Service: payment-service. Budget: 2 pages/shift, 5 non-actionable/week. Events this week: 18 alerts → 12 pages → 4 actionable (33%). Status: over-budget. Top offenders: PaymentLatencyP99 (8 pages, 1 actionable), PaymentTimeoutSpike (3 pages, 2 actionable). Tuning actions: PaymentLatencyP99 → add 10-min hysteresis + raise threshold to p99 > 800ms (was 500ms); PaymentTimeoutSpike → no action (actionable rate acceptable). Chronic breach flag: false (1st week over).
example.note: Every required field populated; rationale cites at least one input by name; owner is a single named handle; version + last_reviewed present.
